en: Is that what this is about? She sends you to sell me on it? No, Nick, she doesn't know I'm
talking to her all week. You guys have talked about it? All the time. But I thought she and
I had come to a decision. Which is? It's not happening. Why not? Because I'm not interested.
And I know it's not cool to say, but I don't like the way it would look.
ko: 말하기는 안 좋지만, 그렇게 보이는 게 싫어.

en: People are going to say what they're going to say. They're not reasons not to go through
with it. Fine, you want to know my biggest concern? My biggest concern is the smell.
The smell? The smell of it. Yeah, and it's not Cece's fault. I mean, they all smell. I've told
her that. You told Cece you think all women... Don't make this a feminist thing. I'm not making
it a feminist thing. How? They smell terrible. It's common knowledge. So your biggest concern
ko: 어떻게? 그들은 끔찍한 냄새가 나. 다 아는 사실이야.

en: would be how it affected the people around you. Sure, a bunch of old drunks will grab at it. But
ko: 물론, 술 취한 노인들이 그것을 잡으려고 할 거야.

en: if your biggest concern is the smell, I'm sure that's highly manageable. Yeah, I guess there's
ko: 하지만 네 가장 큰 걱정이 냄새라면, 그건 충분히 관리할 수 있을 거야.
